raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 310 aims to improve patient care and outcomes at California State Hospitals by gathering data to inform future policies.",
    "AB 1888 ensures that survivors of labor trafficking receive more efficient and comprehensive enforcement of existing labor trafficking laws.",
    "AB 2080 requires the University of California to report on increasing the size and diversity of the physician workforce.",
    "The expansion of full scope Medi-Cal access resulted in more than 1 million additional people in California being enrolled in the program.",
    "The construction of a new Medical Education Building at UC Merced is intended to increase the healthcare workforce in the region.",
    "Fresno State unveiled two state-of-the-art mobile health units designed for delivering basic screenings and vaccinations to underserved communities.",
    "Reedley College launched a new location for its aviation school and training program at Reedley Municipal Airport."
  ]
}
```
